title: Random Harvest
writer: Claudine West, George Froeschel, Arthur Wimperis
actors: Ronald Colman, Greer Garson, Philip Dorn
plot: An amnesiac World War I veteran falls in love with a music hall star, only to suffer an accident which restores his original memories but erases his post-war life.
awards: Nominated for 7 Oscars. 3 wins & 8 nominations total
